key_drivers: Iran war supply shock: Strait of Hormuz disruption pushing WTI crude above $100/bbl and MOVE index to 108.8 (+49% since Feb 27), creating an inflation repricing event that is driving real yields higher and crushing equities

Hawkish Fed hold (Mar 18): FOMC held at 3.50-3.75% with upgraded inflation forecast and hawkish dot plot; only 1 cut projected for 2026, reinforcing higher-for-longer narrative that weighs on growth assets

Risk-off regime: VIX near 27, HY OAS widening to 3.27% (from 3.13%), SOX falling to 7670, and gold ETF outflows of -$5.5B in March signal broad de-risking despite geopolitical safe-haven demand for crude
